title: AutumnPack
body:
As the cozy and cool air rolls around\
and the fun harvest of nature comes to all,\
you can hear the crisp leaves' sound.\
It must now be Fall!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VHA1nD-kdn0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# AutumnPack By InnerToast

Autumnpack is a vanilla-like change to make your minecraft world seem all cozy and orange. Make your whole world seem ready for harvest by equipping this resource pack.

**Like Programmer Art more than Vanilla? Check out [AutumnPack: Programmer Art Edition](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-programmerart)** \
**Don't like Halloween? Check out [AutumnPack: Fall Vibes Only](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-fall-vibes-only)**
## FULLY VANILLA COMPATIBLE!

No Optifine Required! Enjoy the Autumn Season on vanilla clients with NO EXTRA MODS NEEDED! Perfect for anyone who wants to play the game with minimal modifications!

<details>
<summary>General Autumn Changes</summary>

The world's Colormap is changed to change foliage colors.\
*(also includes VanillaTweaks' 'Golden Savannah' already embedded. vanillatweaks.net)*

Grass looks dryer and has leaves scattered throughout- 3 Different variations

Podzol is retextured to blend better with the newer biome colors

Saplings have been changed to be more consistent with their realistic counterparts

Leaves are now orange, yellow, and red depending on the type of leaves\
*(also allows compatibility with VanillaTweaks' 'Visual Sapling Growth,' vanillatweaks.net)*

Brown Mushrooms have variated amounts when placed

Title screen now has a panorama of an autumn landscape, also added custom splash texts.

<details>
<summary>Sapling Guide</summary>

• Oak Sapling → Acorn

• Spruce Sapling → Pinecone

• Birch Sapling → Birch Catkins

• Dark Oak Sapling → Dark Acorn

• Acacia Sapling → Acacia Seed Pods

• Jungle Sapling → Jungle Pods

• Cherry Sapling → Cherry Pits

• Pale Oak Sapling → Pale Acorn

</details>


<details>
<summary>Leaf color guide</summary>

Oak - Orange

Birch - Yellow

Spruce - Unchanged (green)

Dark Oak - Red

Acacia - Red

Jungle - Green/beige (depends on biome)

Pale Oak - Dark Purple

(please keep note that leaves might look 'ugly' in some biomes)

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Halloween Changes</summary>

**Don't like Halloween? Check out [AutumnPack: Fall Vibes Only](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-fall-vibes-only)**

Carved pumpkins and jack-o-lanterns now have 11 different varied faces

Pumpkin Pie has a dab of whipped cream on it

Golden Apples are now Caramel Apples

Cookies are now frosted and have sprinkles

Beetroot, Beetroot seeds, and Beetroot Soup are now Candy Corn, Candy Seeds, and Candy Baskets

Bowls and bowl foods are now in Treat Baskets

Suspicious Stew renamed to "Mischievous Brew" and encourages a 'Trick' or a 'Treat'

<details>
<summary>Pumpkin face guide</summary>

(pumpkins change based on place location)

Default

MC Dungeons Logo

Lego (based on the Lego Minecraft design)

Creeper

Ghast

Ghost

Derp Face

Happy

Mad

Spooked

InnerToast (self promo lol)

</details>

</details>

**If you have any suggestions or bugs to report, submit them in the discord!** \

**AUTUMNPACK IS ONLY OFFICIALLY AVAILABLE ON MODRINTH AND PLANET MINECRAFT!** \
Be cautious of fake reuploads and Bedrock ports!

**If you plan on featuring this in a YouTube Video, please credit my name and put the link in the comments. (It's so I can tell who is using the resource pack)**

some features are not made by me, Vanillatweaks.net
